Module me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.core
Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.functional

Interface IFlixelBasic

All Superinterfaces:
com.badlogic.gdx.utils.Disposable, FlixelDestroyable, FlixelDrawable, FlixelKillable, FlixelUpdatable, FlixelVisible, com.badlogic.gdx.utils.Pool.Poolable
All Known Implementing Classes:
FlixelAnimateSprite, FlixelBar, FlixelBasic, FlixelBasicGroup, FlixelCamera, FlixelObject, FlixelSound, FlixelSprite, FlixelSpriteGroup, FlixelState, FlixelSubState, FlixelText, FlixelTimerManager
public interface IFlixelBasic extends FlixelUpdatable, FlixelDrawable, FlixelDestroyable, FlixelKillable, FlixelVisible, com.badlogic.gdx.utils.Disposable, com.badlogic.gdx.utils.Pool.Poolable
Full FlixelBasic-style contract: per-frame update and draw hooks, existence and active flags, visibility, kill and revive, teardown, and libGDX Disposable / Pool.Poolable hooks. Extend FlixelBasic when you want the default field-based implementation, or implement this interface on your own type when you need a custom base class but still want to add instances to a FlixelState or FlixelBasicGroup.
See Also:
  • FlixelBasic
  • FlixelBasicGroup

    boolean
    isActive()
    When false, FlixelUpdatable.update(float) is skipped even if isExists() is true.

  • Method Details

    • isExists

      boolean isExists()
      When false, groups and states skip this instance for automatic FlixelUpdatable.update(float).
      Returns:
      The current exists flag.

      boolean isActive()
      When false, FlixelUpdatable.update(float) is skipped even if isExists() is true.
      Returns:
      The current active flag.
